---
title: "Homework 11"
format: html
---

```{python}

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
# Make a list
myList = ["Olukayode",2,[1,2,3,4,5], 5,4,4, True, "blue", 3.142]
Third_element = myList[2]
print("Third_element is", Third_element)
listWithinlist = myList[2][1]
print("Third element of inner list is", listWithinlist)

# Append a new element to the list
myList.append("Arowosegbe")
print("Append:", myList)

# Remove an element from the list
myList.remove("blue")
print("Remove:", myList)

# Pop an element to the list
popped_item = myList.pop()
print("Popped item:", popped_item)
print("Pop:", myList)
```

```{python}
# Create a dictionary with at least 5 key-value pairs
myDict = {
    "name": "Alice",
    "age": 25,
    "school": "New York University",
    "is_student": True,
    "major": "Biology"
}

myDict = dict(first = "Thomas",last = "Chidinma", age = 25, town= "Winooski", level = "Senior")
print(myDict)
# Extract all keys
keys = myDict.keys()
print("Keys:", keys)

# Extract all values
values = myDict.values()
print("Values:", values)

#  Use two dictionary methods

#The get method
age_value = myDict.get("age") #This will retrieve the value associated with the key "age"
print("Using get():", age_value)

# The pop method
removed_item = myDict.pop("town") #removes the key "town" from the dictionary and returns its value
print("Removed item:", removed_item)

# Add a new element to the dictionary
myDict["retired"] = False
print("Added new element:", myDict)

# Remove a different element
del myDict["level"]
print("Deleted 'rank':", myDict)
```

```{python}
from numpy import random

# Create a numpy array of length 100 with values between 0 and 1
arr1 = np.random.rand(100)

# Extract the last 10 elements using negative indexing
last_10 = arr1[-10: -1]
print("Last 10 elements:", last_10)

# Convert numeric floats to strings and back to floats
arr_str = arr1.astype(str)         # Convert to strings
arr_float = arr_str.astype(float)  # Convert back to floats
print("First 5 elements after conversion:", arr_float[:5])

# Reshape arr1 into a 10x10 2D array
arr2D = arr1.reshape(10, 10)
print("arr2D shape:", arr2D.shape)

# Create a 10x10 binary array with probability 0.2 for 1s and 0.8 for 0s
arr_bin = np.random.choice([0, 1], size=(10, 10), p=[0.8, 0.2])
print("Binary array:\n", arr_bin)

# Stack arr2D and arr_bin into a 10x10x2 3D array
data_cube = np.stack((arr2D, arr_bin), axis=-1)
print("3D data cube shape is:", data_cube.shape)
```
